## VisiumHD

### preamble

```{r load-libs}
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(SpatialData)
library(SpatialData.data)
library(SpatialData.plot)
```

```{r load-data}
sd <- MouseIntestineVisHD()
```

### analysis

```{r}
# low-resolution image & shape identifiers
i <- grepv("lowres", imageNames(sd))
s <- grepv("_016um", shapeNames(sd))
```

```{r}
cl <- rep(list(c(0, 1/3)), 3) # contrasts
plotSpatialData() + plotImage(sd, i, cl=cl)
```

```{r}
(se <- table(sd))
```

```{r}
# target coordinate space
ct <- "downscaled_lowres" 
# bounding box query
bb <- list(xmin=100, xmax=200, ymin=200, ymax=300)
# apply crop
sp <- crop(sd, bb, j=ct)
```

```{r}
# visualize gene counts spatially
um16 <- grep("16um", shapeNames(sp))
plotSpatialData() + # TODO: legend!
    plotImage(sp, i=i, j=ct, cl=cl) + 
    plotShape(sp, i=s, j=ct, fill="Cd74", col=NA) +
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors=rev(hcl.colors(9, "RdPu")))
```

```{r echo=-1, fig.height=3}
par(mar=c(0,0,0,0))
# rasterization
ex <- rbind(c(100,200), c(200,200), c(200,300), c(100,200))
ex <- st_sfc(st_polygon(list(ex)))
plot(grid <- st_make_grid(ex, cellsize=5, square=FALSE))
```

```{r}
# aggregate gene counts by bin
t <- ShapeFrame(st_sf(geometry=grid))
t <- addCT(t, name=ct, type="identity", data=NULL)
shape(sp, "grid") <- t
sq <- mask(sp, 
    i=s, j="grid", k=ct, 
    how="sum", name="grid_sum")
(sf <- table(sq, "grid_sum"))
```

```{r}
# visualize binned counts spatially
plotSpatialData() +
    plotShape(sq, i="grid", j=ct, fill="Cd74", col=NA) +
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors=rev(hcl.colors(9, "RdPu")))
```

### appendix

::: {.callout-note icon=false, collapse=true}

### session

```{r sess-info}
sessionInfo()
```

:::
